fields.name: Bing Field Airsoft & Paintball Park
fields.description: St. Louis area's premier facility. 60+ acres, City of Bedlam urban field. Monthly Big Games $30.

fields.name: Twin Cities Airsoft (TCA)
fields.description: Minnesota's premier scenario field. High Intensity Airsoft events monthly. Bio BB only. Giant Games 2x yearly.

fields.name: Kankakee Airsoft Factory
fields.description: 7-story factory building with CQB floors + outdoor area. Hosted by MiR Tactical. Open plays Mar–Nov.

fields.name: MiR Tactical HQ — Buffalo Grove
fields.description: Midwest's largest airsoft retailer & event organizer. Hosts Tier 1–3 MilSim events.

fields.name: Blastcamp Paintball & Airsoft
fields.description: Historic Nike Missile Base. 23 acres, monthly ops by Cobra Airsoft Legion.

fields.name: Cedar Airsoft Field
fields.description: ~10 acres with woods, CQB structures. Rec days every Saturday ($20).

fields.name: Hell Survivors
fields.description: 180-acre complex, 12 fields. Hosts Global Conquest, Monster Game, Tippmann World Challenge.

fields.name: Joker's Circus Airsoft
fields.description: Indiana's oldest active airsoft field, founded 1998.

fields.name: i70 Paintball & Airsoft
fields.description: Most popular & well-reviewed field in Ohio.

fields.name: Crossfire Airsoft
fields.description: 30+ acres dedicated airsoft only. 5 distinct fields, weekly games.

fields.name: War Den Airsoft
fields.description: Eastern Ohio woodland field known for big MilSim scenario events.

fields.name: Black Ops Airsoft
fields.description: Midwest's largest pay-to-play airsoft-only field. Open year-round. Outdoor + urban town gameplay. WilSim Saturdays & MilSim events. Fri $10 · Sat–Sun $20. Rentals $15.
